primary_function: Generate lift to support the aircraft in flight

geometry.aspect_ratio: ratio of wingspan squared to wing area
geometry.sweep_angle: angle of wing relative to perpendicular axis
geometry.dihedral_angle: upward angle of wings for stability
geometry.taper_ratio: ratio of tip chord to root chord
geometry.airfoil_type: e.g., NACA series or custom airfoil

spar.function: Carries bending loads and transfers forces to fuselage

ribs.function: Maintain aerodynamic profile and distribute loads

skin.function: Carries shear loads and contributes to overall stiffness

stringers.function: Prevent buckling and increase structural rigidity

flaps.function: Increase lift during takeoff and landing

loads_and_forces.weight: Downward force from structure and fuel
loads_and_forces.torsion: Twisting forces due to aerodynamic loads

fuel_storage.function: Stores fuel to optimize weight distribution
